name: Jaye P. Morgan
description: American popular music singer, actress, and game show panelist
abstract: Jaye P. Morgan (born Mary Margaret Morgan; December 3, 1931) is an American singer, actress, and game show panelist.

concerts.label: Children's Asthma Research Institute and Hospital 3rd Annual Parade of Stars

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Watrous
about_quotes.evidence: Jaye P. Morgan got up and gonged me and got me off of there, mercifully.
